news.title: US-China Tariff Escalation: Trump Raises Duties to 20%
news.titleCN: 中美关税升级：特朗普将对华关税提高至20%
news.summaryCN: 特朗普政府以对华贸易逆差和芬太尼问题为由，将对华关税从10%提升至20%。中国已采取非关税反制措施针对部分美国企业。此举将推高进口成本，加剧供应链中断和通胀压力。
news.summaryEN: Trump administration raised tariffs on Chinese goods from 10% to 20%, citing trade deficit and fentanyl concerns. China retaliated with non-tariff countermeasures. Expected impact: higher import costs, supply chain disruptions, inflationary pressure.
news.whyMattersCN: 关税升级反映了中美贸易关系的持续恶化。从比较法角度，这涉及WTO规则下的贸易救济措施合法性边界，以及单边贸易制裁与多边贸易体制的冲突。对中国而言，需关注反制措施的法律依据和程序正当性。
news.whyMattersEN: The escalation reflects deteriorating US-China trade relations. Raises questions about WTO-compliant trade remedies and tensions between unilateral sanctions and multilateral trade frameworks.

news.title: Trump Announces 25% Tariffs on All Automobiles and Auto Parts
news.titleCN: 特朗普宣布对所有汽车及零部件征收25%关税
news.summaryCN: 特朗普宣布自2025年5月3日起对所有进口汽车及零部件征收25%关税，影响欧盟、日本、墨西哥、加拿大等主要贸易伙伴。此举可能重塑全球汽车供应链格局。
news.summaryEN: Trump announces 25% tariffs on all imported automobiles and auto parts effective May 3, 2025. Affects major trading partners including EU, Japan, Mexico, Canada. Expected to reshape global auto supply chains.
news.whyMattersCN: 汽车关税涉及国际贸易法中的保障措施和反倾销规则适用。25%的高关税可能触发贸易伙伴的报复性措施，加剧全球贸易战风险。对全球供应链法律框架和贸易争端解决机制构成挑战。
news.whyMattersEN: Auto tariffs raise questions about safeguards and anti-dumping rules under international trade law. High tariffs may trigger retaliatory measures, escalating global trade war risks.

news.title: NVIDIA and Google Announce Agentic AI Partnership
news.titleCN: NVIDIA与Google宣布Agentic AI合作伙伴关系
news.summaryCN: NVIDIA、Alphabet和Google宣布在Agentic AI（自主智能体）和Physical AI（机器人）领域展开合作，目标行业包括医疗、制造和能源。此举旨在使AI工具更广泛地惠及开发者。
news.summaryEN: NVIDIA, Alphabet, and Google announce collaboration on Agentic AI and Physical AI. Target industries: healthcare, manufacturing, energy. Aims to democratize AI tools for broader developer access.
news.whyMattersCN: AI合作涉及数据跨境流动、算法透明度和责任归属等法律问题。从比较法角度，Agentic AI的自主决策能力对现有法律责任框架构成挑战，特别是在侵权责任和刑事责任归属方面。
news.whyMattersEN: AI partnerships raise legal questions about cross-border data flows, algorithmic transparency, and liability attribution. Agentic AI challenges existing legal frameworks for tort and criminal liability.

news.title: US-China Tech War: Export Controls on Advanced Semiconductors Tighten
news.titleCN: 中美科技战：先进半导体出口管制持续收紧
news.summaryCN: 美国对华先进芯片出口管制持续，限制中国AI发展能力。阿里巴巴、比亚迪等中国企业面临持续审查。技术脱钩趋势加深。
news.summaryEN: US export controls on advanced chips to China continue, limiting China's AI development capabilities. Chinese companies including Alibaba, BYD face ongoing scrutiny. Tech decoupling deepens.
news.whyMattersCN: 出口管制涉及国际法中的域外管辖权限制和贸易保护主义边界。从比较法角度，这涉及国家安全例外条款在WTO框架下的适用，以及技术主权与自由贸易的冲突。
news.whyMattersEN: Export controls involve questions of extraterritorial jurisdiction and protectionism boundaries. Raises issues about national security exceptions under WTO and conflicts between tech sovereignty and free trade.

news.title: Geopolitical Risk Index Reaches 77/100: High Risk Environment
news.titleCN: 地缘政治风险指数达77/100：高风险环境
news.summaryCN: 综合地缘政治风险评分升至77/100，处于高风险环境。主要驱动因素包括中美贸易紧张、科技脱钩深化、以及全球供应链重组压力。
news.summaryEN: Comprehensive geopolitical risk score rises to 77/100, indicating high-risk environment. Key drivers: US-China trade tensions, tech decoupling, global supply chain restructuring pressures.
news.whyMattersCN: 高风险环境对国际投资法中的投资保护机制构成挑战。投资者需关注政治风险保险、国际投资争端解决机制（ISDS）以及不可抗力条款在跨境交易中的适用。
news.whyMattersEN: High-risk environment challenges investment protection mechanisms in international investment law. Investors should monitor political risk insurance, ISDS, and force majeure clauses.

research.title: AI Governance in Trade Disputes: Export Controls and Global AI Development
research.titleCN: 贸易争端中的AI治理：出口管制与全球AI发展
research.summaryCN: 探讨AI芯片出口管制如何影响全球AI发展格局，对比分析美国与中国的AI监管框架，评估技术脱钩对国际AI治理的影响。
research.summaryEN: Examines how AI chip export controls affect global AI development. Comparative analysis of US vs China AI regulation frameworks. Assesses impact of tech decoupling on international AI governance.
research.whyMattersCN: AI芯片管制涉及国际技术贸易的法律框架重构。研究可为理解技术主权与全球创新之间的张力提供理论框架，对中国AI产业政策的法律设计具有参考价值。
research.whyMattersEN: AI chip controls involve legal framework reconstruction for international technology trade. Offers theoretical framework for understanding tensions between tech sovereignty and global innovation.

research.title: Empirical Impact of Tariffs: Pass-Through Effects on Consumer Prices
research.titleCN: 关税的实证影响：对消费者价格的传导效应
research.summaryCN: 量化分析20%关税对消费者价格的传导效应，研究供应链重组对贸易壁垒的应对策略，评估关税政策的经济法律效果。
research.summaryEN: Quantifies pass-through effects of 20% tariffs on consumer prices. Studies supply chain restructuring responses to trade barriers. Evaluates economic-legal effectiveness of tariff policies.
research.whyMattersCN: 关税传导效应研究涉及贸易政策评估的法律经济学方法。对中国而言，理解关税对国内市场价格的影响机制，有助于设计更精准的贸易反制措施和法律救济机制。
research.whyMattersEN: Tariff pass-through research involves law-and-economics methods for trade policy evaluation. Understanding price transmission mechanisms helps design precise trade countermeasures.

research.title: Agentic AI Legal Frameworks: Liability for Autonomous AI Agents
research.titleCN: Agentic AI法律框架：自主AI智能体的责任归属
research.summaryCN: 研究自主AI智能体的法律责任问题，探讨跨境监管协调挑战，分析现有侵权法和刑事责任框架对AI自主决策的适应性。
research.summaryEN: Studies liability issues for autonomous AI agents. Explores cross-border regulatory harmonization challenges. Analyzes adaptability of existing tort and criminal liability frameworks to AI autonomous decisions.
research.whyMattersCN: Agentic AI的责任归属是AI法律治理的核心难题。研究可为完善中国《人工智能法》立法提供比较法参考，特别是在自动化决策的法律责任分配方面。
research.whyMattersEN: Agentic AI liability is a core challenge in AI legal governance. Offers comparative reference for China's AI Law legislation, especially regarding liability allocation for automated decisions.
